steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:3201 and click Analytics button
steps.expected: Analytics page displayed with Agent Performance section
steps.observed: Analytics page loaded with Agent Performance section visible

steps.expected: Table found with agent names, completed counts, in-progress counts, total tasks, avg completion time, success rate columns
steps.observed: Table found with columns: Agent, Completed, In Progress, Total, Avg Completion, Success Rate

steps.action: Verify at least one agent has tasksCompleted > 0
steps.expected: At least one agent row shows completed > 0
steps.observed: Agent aaaaaaaa has 2 completed, bbbbbbbb has 1 completed, cccccccc has 1 completed

steps.action: Scroll to Task Completion Metrics section
steps.expected: Section visible with metric cards and status distribution
steps.observed: Section displayed with Total Tasks (11), Completion Rate (36.4%), Avg Time to Completion (0m)

steps.action: Verify Total Tasks metric card shows number > 0
Verify Completion Rate metric card shows percentage
Verify Avg Time to Completion metric card exists
steps.expected: Avg Time to Completion card with time value

steps.action: Verify status distribution shows bars for statuses
steps.expected: Status distribution with backlog, ready, in_progress, review, done, blocked
steps.observed: All 6 statuses present: Backlog(2/18%), Ready(1/9%), In Progress(2/18%), Review(1/9%), Done(4/36%), Blocked(1/9%)

steps.expected: Time Tracking section visible with Created → Claimed and Claimed → Completed metrics
steps.observed: Time Tracking section displayed with both metrics

steps.action: Verify Created → Claimed metric card exists with time value
steps.expected: Created → Claimed card with time value

steps.action: Verify Claimed → Completed metric card exists with time value
steps.expected: Claimed → Completed card with time value

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. VAL-ANAL-001 confirmed agent performance table with 3 agents showing completed/in-progress/total/avg completion/success rate. VAL-ANAL-002 confirmed task completion metrics with 11 total tasks, 36.4% completion rate, and all 6 status distributions. VAL-ANAL-003 confirmed time tracking with Created→Claimed and Claimed→Completed metrics.
